title: Shopware
description: Open-source headless commerce platform for building online stores, marketplaces, and B2B/D2C experiences with Symfony and Vue.
installation: Image: dockware/play (the de-facto managed Shopware 6 Docker image; runs Apache + PHP-FPM on port 80). Shopware REQUIRES MySQL 8 / MariaDB 10.11+ (NOT Postgres) - the mariadb add-on is wired in. Valkey (Redis-compatible) is wired in for sessions and app cache. First-run: the image ships a pre-installed demo shop using its bundled MySQL; for production point DATABASE_URL at the external mariadb add-on (set INSTALL=1 / run `bin/console system:install` on first boot to migrate the schema onto it), then create an admin via `bin/console user:create`. Default admin login of the bundled demo is admin / shopware - ROTATE immediately. Rotate APP_SECRET and INSTANCE_ID_HASH (placeholders below) with `openssl rand -hex 32` and the mariadb/db passwords. COMPANION SERVICES (deploy as separate apps sharing the same DATABASE_URL/Redis): a message-consumer worker (`bin/console messenger:consume async,low_priority`, same dockware/play image, run as a long-lived command), a scheduled-task worker (`bin/console scheduled-task:run`), and a cron/cache-warmer. SEARCH: Shopware scales poorly past ~50k products on MySQL search - deploy OpenSearch 2.x separately (NOT an available operator add-on; run it standalone) and set OPENSEARCH_URL + SHOPWARE_ES_ENABLED=1 + SHOPWARE_ES_INDEXING_ENABLED=1. Optionally front the storefront with Varnish/HTTP cache for production.
